Samsung.known_for: MLCC ceramic capacitors at massive scale; default JLC Basic choice for commodity caps.

Murata.known_for: The benchmark for MLCC, RF components, and EMI filters. Automotive-grade lines are industry standard.

TDK.known_for: High-reliability MLCC, inductors, and magnetics. Heavy use in industrial and automotive BOMs.

Yageo.known_for: Largest thick-film chip resistor maker; broad MLCC catalog. Staple of JLC Basic tier.

Kemet.known_for: Tantalum, polymer, and film capacitors — specialized where ceramics won't do.

Vishay.known_for: Broad-line discretes: resistors, MOSFETs, diodes. Respected for precision.

Panasonic.known_for: Polymer electrolytics, film caps, switches. Gold standard for reliability.

Wurth.known_for: Inductors, transformers, connectors with premium German engineering.

Rohm.known_for: Discretes, LDOs, and SiC power devices.

Infineon.known_for: Power MOSFETs, IGBTs, microcontrollers, and security ICs.

TI.known_for: Analog, power, and logic ICs. The reference datasheet for most linear parts.

ADI.known_for: Premium analog, mixed-signal, and RF ICs.

NXP.known_for: Automotive MCUs, logic, and NFC silicon.

ST.known_for: STM32 MCUs, motor control, and MEMS sensors.

Onsemi.known_for: Power management, image sensors, and discretes.

Espressif.known_for: ESP32/ESP8266 Wi-Fi and BLE MCUs — ubiquitous in IoT.

Sunlord.known_for: Power inductors and RF components; well-regarded in Asia-Pacific.

UNI-ROYAL.known_for: Dominant JLC Basic thick-film resistor brand. Extremely high usage volume; assembly yield consistently >99.9%.

Fenghua.known_for: Huge catalog of MLCCs and resistors. Lower cost than Tier-1; datasheets often Chinese-only.

JieJie.known_for: AO3400/AO3401 dual-MOSFET second-source. Default Basic MOSFETs on JLCPCB.

MDD.known_for: Schottky and rectifier diodes at low cost.

WCH.known_for: CH340 USB-UART bridges and CH32V RISC-V MCUs. Extremely common in maker/hobby designs.

AMS.known_for: AMS1117 LDO — the default cheap 1A linear regulator for JLC builds.

XKB.known_for: USB and FPC connectors at aggressive prices.

Chang Jiang.known_for: Small-signal transistors and logic — second-source pricing.

JST.known_for: The de-facto standard for miniature wire-to-board connectors (PH, XH, SH series).

Torex.known_for: Ultra-low quiescent LDOs and switchers for battery-powered designs.

Worldsemi.known_for: Inventor of the WS2812 addressable RGB LED — ubiquitous in maker projects.

WINSOK.known_for: Low-cost power MOSFETs, often second-source to Infineon/Vishay parts.

BOOMELE.known_for: Generic 2.54mm pin headers and prototyping connectors at commodity pricing.
